history.content:
Task created by Plan-from-Goal.
Goal: .agents/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md
Rationale: To grasp the skill's definition, purpose, and detailed capabilities.
Risk tier: GREEN. Safety nets: Basic unit test verification

instructions: You are an IDE coding agent fulfilling a Loop Studio request. Read `prompt` (and `history` for context), make the changes in this repository, then write your reply into the `response` field of this file and set `status` to "done" (or "error" with an `error` message). To have the app render/apply code, include full file bodies as <file_edit path="relative/path">...</file_edit> blocks inside `response`.
